title: M1731G - EQT Group and CICAP Limited
text:
## View

NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR APPROVAL OF AN ACQUISITION
Applicant: Purchaser: EQT AB
Target: CICAP Limited.
Sellers: Master PHC (CIP IX), L.P., CICAP HC, L.P., Jeremy
Coller, Coller GS Equity Pooling GP Limited, HPC
Holdings Investor – Machine, LLC, Dextra Directs B-
1 LP, Dextra Strategic Partners B-2 LP, Dextra B-5
Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter LP
Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-5 Offshore
Splitter LP Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-
5 Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter
LP Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-5
Offshore Splitter LP Dextra B-5 Offshore Splitter LP,
Dextra Strategic Partners B-5 Onshore LP, State
Street Global Advisors, Inc.
Proposed acquisition: The proposed transaction is an acquisition by the Purchaser of
the entire issued share capital of the Target.
Industries involved: Funds and Asset management.
The Guernsey Competition and Regulatory Authority (GCRA) invites comments regarding the proposed
acquisition. The deadline for comments is 5 p.m. on 17 March 2026. Please send any comments by e-
mail to info@gcra.gg and clearly marked “EQT Group and Coller Capital M1731G”. A public version of the
merger application form is available on request.
Guernsey Competition and Regulatory Authority (GCRA)
Suite 4
La Plaiderie
St Peter Port
Guernsey
https://www.gcra.gg/

---
